Subject: A young man
Theme: Encounter with urban waste and pests
Event: While walking past a trash pile, the young man recoiled in disgust as a cockroach suddenly scuttled across his path, reminding him of the unhygienic mess nearby.
story_prompts: The same A young man walks briskly along a grimy city street, grimacing slightly at discarded wrappers and debris scattered near cracked sidewalks under flickering streetlights.
The same A young man pauses, nose wrinkled and body recoiling in discomfort as a towering trash pile looms on one side, overflowing with rotting food and plastic containers.
The same A young man takes a cautious step back, eyes wide in disgust as a shiny cockroach scuttles rapidly across his footpath, contrasting with the faded graffiti walls nearby.
The same A young man hurriedly steps away from the unkempt corner, head turned with a scowl, while shadows of urban decay and scattered waste linger around dimly lit alley entrances.
